description: Create comprehensive pathomechanism diagram for OI Type VI showing PEDF signaling network, downstream pathways, and therapeutic targets
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(14, 10))
ax.set_xlim(0, 14)
ax.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title('Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type VI: PEDF/SERPINF1 Pathomechanism', 
             fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

# Central node - SERPINF1 mutation
central = plt.Circle((7, 7.5), 0.8, color='#e74c3c', alpha=0.9, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(central)
ax.text(7, 7.5, 'SERPINF1\nMutation', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, 
        fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)

# Loss of PEDF
ax.annotate('', xy=(7, 6.2), xytext=(7, 6.7),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='black', lw=2))
loss_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((5.2, 5.5), 3.6, 0.7, 
                                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                    facecolor='#e67e22', alpha=0.9, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(loss_box)
ax.text(7, 5.85, 'Loss of Secreted PEDF', ha='center', va='center', 
        fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)

# ER Stress branch (for missense mutations)
er_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((10.2, 7.0), 2.5, 1.0,
                                  boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                  facecolor='#9b59b6', alpha=0.8, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(er_box)
ax.text(11.45, 7.5, 'ER Stress\n(mutant PEDF\nretention)', ha='center', va='center',
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
ax.annotate('', xy=(10.2, 7.5), xytext=(7.8, 7.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#9b59b6', lw=2))

# ER stress consequences
ax.text(12.5, 6.4, '→ Osteoblast\n   apoptosis', fontsize=8, color='#9b59b6')
ax.annotate('', xy=(11.45, 6.5), xytext=(11.45, 7.0),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#9b59b6', lw=1.5))

# Downstream pathways - 4 branches
# Branch 1: OPG/RANKL (left)
b1 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.5, 3.5), 2.8, 1.2,
                               boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                               facecolor='#3498db', alpha=0.8, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(b1)
ax.text(1.9, 4.1, '↓ OPG/RANKL\nDysregulation\n→ ↑ Osteoclasts', ha='center', va='center',
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
ax.annotate('', xy=(1.9, 4.7), xytext=(5.5, 5.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#3498db', lw=2))

# Branch 2: Wnt signaling
b2 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3.8, 3.5), 2.8, 1.2,
                               boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                               facecolor='#2ecc71', alpha=0.8, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(b2)
ax.text(5.2, 4.1, '↓ Wnt/β-catenin\nSignaling\n→ ↓ Osteoblasts', ha='center', va='center',
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
ax.annotate('', xy=(5.2, 4.7), xytext=(6.2, 5.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#2ecc71', lw=2))

# Branch 3: TGF-β
b3 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((7.2, 3.5), 2.8, 1.2,
                               boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                               facecolor='#f39c12', alpha=0.8, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(b3)
ax.text(8.6, 4.1, '↑ TGF-β\nSignaling\n→ Bone + Vascular', ha='center', va='center',
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
ax.annotate('', xy=(8.1, 4.7), xytext=(7.8, 5.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#f39c12', lw=2))

# Branch 4: Sclerostin/Osteocyte
b4 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((10.5, 3.5), 2.8, 1.2,
                               boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                               facecolor='#1abc9c', alpha=0.8, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(b4)
ax.text(11.9, 4.1, '↑ Sclerostin\n↑ MEPE, DMP-1\n→ ↓ Mineralization', ha='center', va='center',
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
ax.annotate('', xy=(11.0, 4.7), xytext=(8.5, 5.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#1abc9c', lw=2))

# Final convergence - Clinical phenotype
conv = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, 1.0), 9.0, 1.5,
                                boxstyle="round,pad=0.2",
                                facecolor='#c0392b', alpha=0.9, zorder=5)
ax.add_patch(conv)
ax.text(7.0, 1.75, 'OI TYPE VI PHENOTYPE', ha='center', va='center',
        fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
ax.text(7.0, 1.3, '• Excess unmineralized osteoid  • Fish-scale lamellae  • Recurrent fractures\n'
        '• Progressive skeletal deformity  • Short stature  • ↑ Adiposity (mouse)',
        ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='white', zorder=6)

# Arrows to phenotype
for x in [1.9, 5.2, 8.6, 11.9]:
    ax.annotate('', xy=(min(max(x, 3.5), 10.5), 2.5), xytext=(x, 3.5),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))

# Treatment annotations
ax.text(0.3, 2.2, 'Tx: Denosumab\n(anti-RANKL)', fontsize=7, color='#3498db',
        fontweight='bold', fontstyle='italic')
ax.text(0.3, 1.4, 'Tx: Setrusumab\n(anti-Sclerostin)', fontsize=7, color='#1abc9c',
        fontweight='bold', fontstyle='italic')
ax.text(0.3, 0.6, 'Tx: Fresolimumab\n(anti-TGF-β)', fontsize=7, color='#f39c12',
        fontweight='bold', fontstyle='italic')

# IFITM5 connection
ax.text(1.5, 8.5, 'IFITM5 p.S40L\n(Atypical OI VI)', fontsize=8, color='#8e44ad',
        fontweight='bold', ha='center')
ax.annotate('', xy=(5.0, 7.5), xytext=(2.5, 8.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#8e44ad', lw=1.5, linestyle='dashed'))
ax.text(3.5, 8.0, '↓ PEDF\nsecretion', fontsize=7, color='#8e44ad', ha='center')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('oi_vi_pathomechanism.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Pathomechanism diagram saved successfully")
